reference.domains: (topic reference) (topic hi-d) (topic ui-d) (topic sw-d) (topic indexing-d) (topic ut-d) a(base ishcondition) a(base varid) a(base varref) a(base cid) a(base partslist) (topic oce-d) (topic sdlVariables-c) (topic oceCommonElements-c) (topic oceMetaDecl-c) (topic oceTopic-c) (topic oceTopic-c reference oceReference-c) (topic oceTopic-c hi-d oceHighlight-c) (topic oceTopic-c ui-d oceUi-c) (topic oceTopic-c sw-d oceSoftware-c)
reference.title: Print quality specifications (installation)

section.title: Preparation

li.p: Paper with a clear white top surface

section.p: Example media: A self-adhesive polymeric vinyl media, such as Canon MPI2000.

section.title: Print the files (optional, part of the installation task)
Specifications
section.p: The installation been completed successfully if both prints are made without:

li.p: any Machine Recoverable Error (MRE) or unexpected Operator Recovery Error (ORE).
Signs of touches between media and printheads.

section.title: Print quality
section.p: A detailed print quality assessment is not part of the print test/installation procedure.
However, in case one or more of the print defects stated below are present in one or both prints, start the applicable troubleshooting procedure.

li.p: 4pt positive letter type not readable with ‘open’ characters in the 1K field.
White lines not visible in the square colored targets
8 pass: Light lines in each swath* with a 5 mm pitch for all colors (= media step).
4-pass: Light lines in each swath* with a 20 mm pitch for all colors (= media step).
Density variations per swath (OD-banding) for one color or more color(s).
Gloss variations per swath (gloss banding) for one or more color(s).
Rough structure in single black or composite black (wrinkle).
Light horizontal lines (streaks) repeating for all swaths for one or more color(s).

section.p: * Ignore if present within the first half meter from the leading edge.
Please note that print quality is also affected by used the media. Always make sure the observed print quality artefacts are not caused by variation and/or defects in the media.
